tasks.compile:deb: deno desktop -A --exclude dist --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu -o dist/TimeTracker.deb . && node scripts/deb-version.mjs dist/TimeTracker.deb $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
tasks.compile:win: deno desktop -A --exclude dist --exclude .next/cache --exclude node_modules/typescript --exclude node_modules/@types --exclude node_modules/@img --exclude node_modules/sharp --exclude node_modules/@next/swc-win32-x64-msvc --exclude node_modules/@next/swc-linux-x64-gnu --exclude node_modules/@next/swc-linux-x64-musl --icon ./icons/app.ico --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -o dist/win/TimeTracker .
